SEARCH
Package com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.infrastructure

Class InMemoryTransactionRepository

java.lang.Object
com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.infrastructure.InMemoryTransactionRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
TransactionRepository
@Repository public class InMemoryTransactionRepository extends Object implements TransactionRepository
Thread-safe in-memory implementation of TransactionRepository.

Uses a ConcurrentHashMap for O(1) lookups and a separate list to maintain insertion order for the "list all" use case.
